x402_status.summary: Reports plugin version, role, backend, network, wallet, config status

x402_wallet_status.summary: Reports Circle wallet backend, address, network, CLI availability

x402_wallet_balance.summary: Reports wallet USDC balance via Circle CLI

x402_networks.summary: Lists 24 networks with capability matrix (buyer_cli, buyer_dcw, seller, gateway)

x402_service_search.summary: Searches Circle marketplace via CLI; empty results acceptable

x402_service_inspect.summary: Inspects URL without paying; returns status, headers, payment-required challenge

x402_supports.summary: Preflight check; returns supported flag, payment options, network info

x402_fetch.summary: Fetches URL without paying; returns 402 challenge when payment required

x402_pay.summary: Pays for x402 resource via Circle CLI; returns payment status and protected response

paylabs_evidence.protected_response_summary: Brain planning response with normalized goal, route tier, discovery strategy, and service execution plan

chain_comparison_fix.description: Post-payment validation now normalizes network identity through the centralized registry. ARC-TESTNET, arcTestnet, and eip155:5042002 all resolve to the same canonical CAIP-2 during _ensure_ready().

seller_regression_scope.description: Focused protocol regression tests covering: 402 challenge generation, authorization payload acceptance, no requirement for authorization.asset or authorization.payTo, server-authoritative network/asset/seller/amount, failed settlement does not execute handler, successful settlement executes handler once, canonical base64 JSON PAYMENT-RESPONSE

limitations.hermes_buyer_plugin_tools: Live validated against PayLabs via x402_pay plugin tool
limitations.hermes_seller_middleware: Covered by focused protocol regression tests
limitations.public_hermes_seller_deployment: Deferred to new Hermes-powered web application
limitations.pr5_scope: Gateway deposits, wallet deployment, daily budgets deferred
